allow: Bash(mkdir -p backend/src/config backend/src/controllers backend/src/services backend/src/routes backend/src/middlewares backend/src/models backend/src/utils backend/src/prompts backend/src/validations backend/src/helpers backend/src/sockets backend/src/jobs backend/src/uploads)
Bash(mkdir -p frontend/src/pages frontend/src/components frontend/src/layouts frontend/src/context frontend/src/services frontend/src/hooks frontend/src/utils frontend/src/styles)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/health" -ErrorAction Stop; $r.message } catch { "Backend no responde - reiniciando..."; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "src/server.js" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\Usuario\\Desktop\\Fresata\\backend" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels" -ErrorAction Stop; $response.tunnels | ForEach-Object { $_.public_url } } catch { "Esperando ngrok..." })

PowerShell(try { $t = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels" -ErrorAction Stop; $t.tunnels[0].public_url } catch { "ngrok no está corriendo - reiniciando..."; Start-Process -FilePath "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\ngrok-bin\\ngrok.exe" -ArgumentList "http 5000"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $t = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels"; $t.tunnels[0].public_url })
